title: Toolchain Selection, Compatibility, and Reproducible Setup
description: Select a minimal compatible toolchain and prove clean-machine setup. Learners cumulatively produce a pinned bootstrap and compatibility matrix through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Pin supported runtime and package-manager versions with one authoritative source.
Commit appropriate lockfiles and verify deterministic clean installs.
Choose tools with clear ownership and minimal duplicate diagnostics.
